title: $3 Million Milestone
author: ElizabethV_Stone
selftext:
Today was one of those moments where I had to stop for a second and just look at the screen

After years of grinding learning the hard way making mistakes and slowly improving my account finally crossed $3M today

It definitely didn t start anywhere close to this There were plenty of setbacks along the way and more than a few times where I questioned whether I was doing the right thing But over time things slowly started to compound

A lot of what got me here wasn t big wins It was consistency risk management and sticking with the process even during the rough periods

Every week I organize materials that I find beneficial this is nothing remarkable it is simply part of my daily routine

The market is pretty rough today and a lot of things are red which honestly made this moment feel even more surreal

Together with a few friends all of whom are co investors in the same stock portfolio I have formed a study group dedicated to portfolio strategies There are absolutely no hidden catches or fees involved it is completely free of charge If you are interested in joining please feel free to leave a comment or send me a private message at any time I would be delighted to welcome you to our group
